fields.name: Job Queue Entries Until Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of job queue entries that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: User Posting Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period number of the documents that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: No. Series Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period number of the number series for the documents that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Date Filter2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date filter for documents that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: Date Filter3
fields.tooltip: Specifies the filter date for the documents that are displayed in the Administration Cue on the Role Center.

fields.name: CDS Integration Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors related to data integration.

fields.name: Coupled Data Synch Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors that occurred in the latest synchronization of coupled data between Business Central and Dynamics 365 Sales.
